about.headline: The bridge between German know-how and Australian tax law
about.text: We are a team of German expats and Australian tax professionals with years of experience in Australian tax law. From first-hand experience, we know how confusing the Australian tax system can be — especially for German backpackers and expats. With our background in tax and accounting, we founded DownUnder Steuerberatung to provide exactly the support we wished we had back then.
about.imageAlt: Young travellers laughing together on an Australian beach

items.question: Do I have to pay tax in Australia as a German backpacker?
items.answer: Yes. As soon as you work and earn income in Australia, you are generally liable to pay tax. Important: Even if your employer already withholds tax, you usually still need to lodge a tax return at the end of the financial year.

items.question: When do I need to lodge a tax return in Australia?
items.answer: The Australian financial year runs from 1 July to 30 June. The deadline is 31 October, unless you use a registered Tax Agent — in which case extended deadlines apply.

items.question: Can I get overpaid tax back?
items.answer: Often, yes. Backpackers in particular frequently overpay tax during the year because employers sometimes apply flat tax rates. With a correctly lodged tax return, you can claim back the overpaid amount. How much you get back depends on your income and individual circumstances.

items.question: Do I also have to pay tax in Germany?
items.answer: That depends on your tax residency status. We review your situation and advise you on how to handle double taxation.

cta.headline: Ready for your tax return?
cta.text: Book a free initial consultation and find out whether — and how much — you may be entitled to as a refund.

services.headline: Australian Tax Returns
services.subline: Support with your tax return — efficient and transparent
services.description: We professionally prepare your Australian tax return in accordance with current ATO requirements. We ensure all relevant details are captured accurately and potential tax benefits are appropriately considered.
includes: Structured recording of your income and potential deductible items
Processing and lodgement within less than 10 business days

services.headline: Superannuation Payout
services.subline: Support with claiming your superannuation contributions
services.description: When you leave Australia, you can claim your accumulated superannuation contributions via a DASP application. We help you through the process.
includes: Assistance with lodging the DASP application
Transfer of funds to your nominated bank account
services.imageAlt: Plant growing from coins — symbol for growing savings

services.headline: TFN & ABN Service
services.description: A Tax File Number (TFN) is essential for any employment in Australia, and as a self-employed contractor you may also need an Australian Business Number (ABN). We take care of the application process for you.
includes: Review of your situation to determine whether additional registrations are required (e.g. GST)
services.imageAlt: Traveller at the airport — a fresh start in Australia

services.headline: Personalised Tax Advisory
services.subline: Tailored advice for your individual situation
services.description: Whether it’s double taxation, tax residency or international income streams — our experts advise you individually and find the optimal solution.
services.imageAlt: Successful tax consultation — two people in the office

story.headline: Our Story
paragraphs: DownUnder Steuerberatung was born from the personal experience of one of our co-founders. When he moved from Germany to Australia, he discovered that the Australian tax system is complex, information in German is scarce, and professional help is hard to find.
With our background in tax and accounting, we decided to close exactly that gap. We offer the help we wished we had back then — easy to understand, digital, and in German.

differentiators.title: First-Hand Experience
differentiators.description: We know the challenges of being a German expat in Australia from personal experience.

differentiators.title: Tax Expertise
differentiators.description: Our advisory is built on solid professional knowledge in tax and accounting.

differentiators.title: 100% Digital
differentiators.description: Fully digital process — whether you're in the city, at the beach, or in the Australian outback.

members.name: Josh
members.description: Josh has worked at accounting firms in Australia for over six years. He holds a Bachelor’s degree in Business with a major in Accounting and recently became a member of Chartered Accountants Australia and New Zealand. He co-founded DownUnder Steuerberatung to help Germans navigate the Australian tax system.

members.name: Tim
members.description: Tim has worked in auditing in both Germany and Australia. As a German expat, he fulfilled his dream of travelling the world a few years ago and has lived in Australia since. He brings together practical experience and professional expertise, having initially navigated the challenges of cross-border taxation as a backpacker himself. Through DownUnder Steuerberatung, he now passes on valuable tax guidance to Germans in Australia.

content.subtitle: General Information
content.text: The following information provides a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit this website. Personal data is any data that can be used to personally identify you.
The entity responsible for data processing on this website is:

content.subtitle: Contact Form
content.text: When you submit an enquiry via our contact form, your details from the form — including the contact information you provide — are stored by us for the purpose of processing your request and in case of follow-up questions. We do not share this data without your consent.

content.subtitle: Server Log Files
content.text: The hosting provider of this website automatically collects and stores information in server log files, which your browser transmits automatically. These include: browser type and version, operating system, referrer URL, hostname of the accessing device, time of the server request, and IP address.

This website is hosted by an external service provider (host). The personal data collected on this website is stored on the host's servers. This may include IP addresses, contact enquiries, meta and communication data, contractual data, contact details, names, website access logs, and other data generated via a website.

You have the right at any time to obtain free information about the origin, recipients and purpose of your stored personal data. You also have the right to request the correction or deletion of this data.

list: Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR)

content.text: This website currently does not use any analytics tools or tracking cookies. Should this change, we will update this privacy policy accordingly and ask for your consent before activation.

datenschutz.footer: As of April 2026. This privacy policy is updated regularly.

impressum.introNote: Information pursuant to § 5 TMG (German Telemedia Act)

sections.title: Dispute Resolution
content: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR).
We are neither willing nor obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
